title: picea likiangensis var. hirtella
intro: Picea likiangensis var. hirtella, also known as Tibetan silver fir, is a coniferous evergreen tree species belonging to the Pinaceae family. The plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tibetan silver fir include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. Tibetan silver fir can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and essential oils, which are used to treat various health conditions.
